title: solanum nigrum var. legitimum
intro: Solanum nigrum var. legitimum, also known as black nightshade, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum var. legitimum include its ability to help manage fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain cancer cells. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to detoxify the body and promote overall well-being.
